instruction: Two dots are on the head of the pin. Delete the duplicate.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="map-pin" data-source="heroicons/outline/map-pin.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 10.5a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.5 10.5c0 7.142-7.5 11.25-7.5 11.25S4.5 17.642 4.5 10.5a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 15 0Z"/></g>
  <circle id="pin-dot" fill="#e63946" cx="64" cy="46" r="4" />
  <ellipse id="shadow" fill="#0009" cx="64" cy="112" rx="18" ry="3" />
  <circle id="pin-dot-dup" fill="#e63946" cx="74" cy="46" r="4" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="map-pin" data-source="heroicons/outline/map-pin.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 10.5a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.5 10.5c0 7.142-7.5 11.25-7.5 11.25S4.5 17.642 4.5 10.5a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 15 0Z"/></g>
  <circle id="pin-dot" fill="#e63946" cx="64" cy="46" r="4" />
  <ellipse id="shadow" fill="#0009" cx="64" cy="112" rx="18" ry="3" />
</svg>
